text:
IMPLEMENTATION COMPLETE
Task: fix-global-styles-and-fonts | Files: global.css, BaseLayout.astro, Container.astro, Button.astro, Card.astro, Header.astro, Footer.astro, navigation.js, PageLayout.astro | Summary: Replaced DM Sans/Urbanist with Roboto/RobotoSlab; added dark-footer/faq-active colors, font-slab, body font-weight; updated all max-w-7xl to max-w-[1320px]; button rounded-[14px] with WP padding; card rounded-[14px]; footer bg-[#191A1C], contact tod@reddzone.net/503 791 9854; removed Blog nav item; hero py-[100px]

IMPLEMENTATION COMPLETE
Task: fix-homepage-components | Files: 7 files modified | Summary:
- HeroSlider.svelte: Updated slide titles/CTAs to match WP ("Welcome To The Redd Zone", "Read More" CTAs), fixed height to h-[480px] md:h-[700px] lg:h-[860px], added font-semibold, rounded-[14px] button, font-slab style
- MissionSection.astro: Replaced with About Us section (py-[100px] bg-cream), WP copy about Tod Jones/Jeremy Richardson, rounded-[14px] images
- PartnerLogos.astro: Fixed opacity 0.6→0.2, slice(0,6), py-[100px] bg-white, removed SectionHeading and grayscale
- ProductShowcase.astro: Updated to "Our Store"/"Featured Items", square image aspect ratio, centered card layout with "Contact Redd Zone Team Member" CTA
- CTABanner.astro: py-[100px], CTA changed to "Send Brief"
- index.astro: Removed BlogPreview, added Mission Statement section, What We Do/Services section, Why Choose section, reordered to match WP structure
- services.js: Updated titles to Natural Components, Large Selection, Unique Patterns, Creative People
summary: Homepage components all updated to match WP

text:
IMPLEMENTATION COMPLETE

Task: fix-inner-pages | Files: 16 modified, 2 created, 2 deleted

Summary:
1. ContactInfo.astro — updated email to tod@reddzone.net, phone to 503 791 9854, heading to "Contact Details", description to match WP
2. contact-us.astro — updated Send Brief mailto to tod@reddzone.net, both sections to py-[100px]
3. FAQAccordion.svelte — black bg tabs, white text, red (#DF1129) active state, rounded-[14px], py-5
4. faq.js — replaced all content with WP exact pricing (5 items, consolidated incubator+eyeing into one Q)
5. vertical-incubator.md — title changed to 'Redd Zone "Best Fry" Incubators'
6. eyeing-station.md — title changed to "Portable Egg Eyeing Stations"
7. instant-hatchery.md — title changed to "Instant Hatcheries"
8. Created hybrid-incubation.md (order: 4) and streamside-incubation.md (order: 5)
9. Deleted tray-system.md and water-management.md
10. ProductCard.astro — button text changed to "Contact Redd Zone Team Member"
11. PartnerGrid.astro — opacity-20 (from 0.6), py-[100px], removed grayscale classes
12. All section pages — py-16 md:py-24 → py-[100px] across about-us, products, faq, contact-us, outreach-programs, merchandise, our-partners (BlogPreview); about-us team heading → "Meet the People Who Take Risks", services heading → "Take Your Craft to the Next Level"
